headline: Here’s How Nancy Pelosi Beat the Stock Market and Warren Buffett
summary: The S&P 500 has delivered roughly 13% annualized returns over the past decade, one of the strongest bull runs in modern history. Yet both look like amateur hour next to the woman still serving out her final term in Congress: Nancy Pelosi.
